phrases.intent_en: Ask for a return ticket to Paris Montparnasse
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un billet aller-retour pour Paris Montparnasse, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY un bee-YAY ah-LAY-ruh-TOOR poor pah-REE mohn-par-NASS seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The high-speed TGV from Bordeaux Saint-Jean reaches Paris in just over two hours since the LGV Sud-Atlantique opened in 2017.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform the next train to Lyon departs from
phrases.text_local: De quel quai part le prochain train pour Lyon ?
phrases.pronunciation: duh kel KAY par luh proh-SHAN TRAN poor lyohn
phrases.cultural_note: Platform information is displayed on large departure boards in the main hall; check these regularly as they update shortly before departure.

responses.english: Check the live display board. Platforms vary by train.
responses.french: Consultez l'affichage en direct. Les quais varient selon le train.

phrases.text_local: Où puis-je déposer mes bagages en consigne ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh day-poh-ZAY may bah-GAZH ahn kohn-SEEN-yuh
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage storage (consigne) is available at major French stations; look for the left-luggage office or automated lockers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this train stops at Arcachon
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que ce train s'arrête à Arcachon ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh suh TRAN sah-RET ah ar-kah-SHOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Regional TER trains connect Bordeaux Saint-Jean to Arcachon in about 50 minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tram stop for the city centre is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'arrêt de tram pour le centre-ville, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah-RAY duh TRAM poor luh SAHN-truh VEEL seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Bordeaux tram network connects the station to the city centre and other major points; tram line C stops directly outside.

responses.english: Just at the exit, on the right.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ah lah sor-TEE, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.french: Juste à la sortie, sur la droite.
